final:
module mux_4to1(
	input [7:0] a,
	input [7:0] b,
	input [7:0] c,
	input [7:0] d,
	input [1:0] sel,
	output [7:0] y
);

	assign y = (sel == 2'b00) ? a : 
	           (sel == 2'b01) ? b : 
	           (sel == 2'b10) ? c : d;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      y <= ~a; y <= ~b; y <= ~c; y <= ~d;
    end
  end

endmodule
